prompt: Create a photorealistic high-angle selfie portrait of a beautiful young blonde woman with shoulder-length wavy hair, bright blue eyes, clear glowing skin, and a warm natural smile looking directly into the camera. The camera is held above her face at arm’s length, creating a flattering overhead perspective with her extended arm visible in the foreground and her other hand resting casually on top of her hair. She wears a soft white long-sleeve wrap blouse with a deep V neckline and buttoned cuff. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the side, soft natural shadows, realistic skin texture, sharp eyes, glossy lips, subtle makeup, and a cheerful intimate lifestyle mood. The setting is a cozy modern apartment living room with wooden floor, a gray sofa, pale curtains, framed wall art, shelves, and one large leafy potted plant in the softly blurred background. Compose as a vertical 2:3 portrait, close crop from upper torso to head, shallow depth of field, smartphone selfie realism, natural lens perspective, high detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic high-angle selfie portrait of a beautiful young blonde woman with shoulder-length wavy hair, bright blue eyes, clear glowing skin, and a warm natural smile looking directly into the camera. The camera is held above her face at arm’s length, creating a flattering overhead perspective with her extended arm visible in the foreground and her other hand resting casually on top of her hair. She wears a soft white long-sleeve wrap blouse with a deep V neckline and buttoned cuff. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the side, soft natural shadows, realistic skin texture, sharp eyes, glossy lips, subtle makeup, and a cheerful intimate lifestyle mood. The setting is a cozy modern apartment living room with wooden floor, a gray sofa, pale curtains, framed wall art, shelves, and one large leafy potted plant in the softly blurred background. Compose as a vertical 2:3 portrait, close crop from upper torso to head, shallow depth of field, smartphone selfie realism, natural lens perspective, high detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张逼真的高角度自拍人像，主角是一位美丽的 留着齐肩波浪卷发、拥有明亮蓝眼睛、皮肤清透发光且带着温暖自然笑容的年轻金发女性，正视镜头。相机由她手臂伸直举在脸部上方，营造出讨喜的俯视视角，前景可见她伸出的手臂，另一只手随意地搭在头顶。她身穿一件 柔软的白色长袖裹身衬衫，带有深 V 领口和纽扣袖口。利用侧面的温暖黄金时段阳光，呈现柔和的自然阴影、逼真的皮肤纹理、锐利的眼神、光泽的双唇、精致的淡妆，以及欢快亲切的生活氛围。场景设定在舒适的现代公寓客厅，背景有木地板、灰色沙发、浅色窗帘、墙面艺术画、置物架以及一盆叶片宽大的盆栽，背景经过柔焦处理。构图为 2:3 竖版人像，从上半身到头部进行近景裁剪，浅景深，具备智能手机自拍的真实感，自然的镜头透视，高细节，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
